nl_query: Which bundles have been in SCANNING status for more than 24 hours without reaching COMPLETE, and show the exam hall, bundle code, scanned count, expected count, and the device that last scanned a script in that bundle?
failed_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.bundle_code, b.exam_hall, b.scanned_count, b.expected_count, sh.device_id
FROM   bundle b
JOIN   scan_history  sh ON sh.script_id = b.id
JOIN   answer_script  a ON a.id = sh.script_id
WHERE  a.lifecycle_status  = 'ATTEMPTED'
  AND  a.scan_status       = 'SCANNED'
  AND  a.evaluation_status = 'NOT_ASSIGNED'
  AND  a.block_status      = 'NONE'
  AND  sh.scanned_at      < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND  sh.replaced_previous = FALSE
GROUP BY b.id, b.bundle_code, b.exam_hall, b.scanned_count, b.expected_count, sh.device_id
ORDER BY sh.scanned_at ASC
LIMIT  500;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): exam_schedule_cache.exam_hall, exam_schedule_cache.exam_hall. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
